spanish: Este chico llevaba un tiempo viviendo en Ciudad de México.
english: This guy had been living in Mexico City for a while.
explanation: Past progressive with 'estar/ir/venir/llevar' + gerund - describes an ongoing action in the past that was still happening

spanish: Cuanto antes empecéis a trabajar en vuestro acento, mejor.
english: The sooner you start working on your accent, the better.
explanation: Comparative structure with 'cuanto... más/menos' - expresses proportion between two changing quantities

spanish: No fue hasta cuando empezó a trabajar en su pronunciación que se dio cuenta de sus errores.
english: It wasn't until he started working on his pronunciation that he realized his mistakes.
explanation: 'No fue hasta... que' - emphatic structure emphasizing the moment when something finally happened
